CREATE TABLE utf8_test (input String, normalized String);
SELECT input, normalized, length(normalized) AS nfd_len FROM utf8_test;
CREATE TABLE utf8_test2 AS SELECT input, length(input) AS orig_length, normalizeUTF8NFD(input) AS nfd FROM utf8_test;
SELECT orig_length, length(nfd) AS nfd_len FROM utf8_test2;
SELECT input, normalizeUTF8NFD(input) AS nfd FROM utf8_test WHERE length(input) < 5;
SELECT input, normalizeUTF8NFD(input) AS nfd FROM utf8_test WHERE input LIKE '%á%';
SELECT t1.input, normalizeUTF8NFD(t2.input) AS nfd FROM utf8_test t1 JOIN utf8_test t2 ON t1.input <> t2.input;
WITH (SELECT normalized FROM utf8_test) AS nfd_values SELECT count(*), nfd_values FROM nfd_values GROUP BY nfd_values;
